releaseNotes: Fixed crash after granting media/file permission
Improved Huawei P30 Pro EMUI 12 compatibility
Improved Vivo V40 Pro OriginOS 6 Android 16 compatibility
Added safer Local Music MediaStore scanning
Prevented crash from missing or null MediaStore columns
Improved local music scan fallback behavior
Android Auto, Online Radio, EQ, Cast and existing playback logic remain unchanged
